name: adversarial-spec
description: A Claude Code plugin that iteratively refines product specifications by debating between multiple LLMs (GPT, Gemini, Grok, etc.) until all models reach consensus. Claude acts as an active participant, not just an orchestrator.

status_cleared.reason: SM cleanup: only full_pipeline pass is real pass. Needs re-verification.

agent_a.comment: Docs quality 10/10. README present. 12 features, 4 permissions claimed.

agent_b.comment: 18 files analyzed. Found: 6 network, 34 file, 28 env, 2 system calls. Primary: python.

agent_c_star.comment: 112 findings: 0 critical, 16 high, 43 medium, 53 low. No obfuscation. No injection.

agent_d.comment: Score 60. 0 mismatches. Risk: medium. Safety overrides: none triggered.

agent_audit.manager_summary: 5/5 agents completed. Score: 60/100, Risk: medium. 0 mismatches, 112 scanner findings. Rejected at 60% confidence. No safety overrides.

pm_override.reason: PM batch review: score 50-69, 0 injection, 0 critical findings, no safety override triggered. Manual review not warranted — scoring system places these in MR from scanner penalty inflation, not from real security concerns.
